message:
fix: Add anchors to email regex and add missing feedback category

- ContactForm.tsx: Email validation regex now properly anchored with ^ and $
  to prevent partial matches (e.g., "invalid<valid@email.com>" would pass)
- support-helpers.ts: Added missing "feedback" category to match actual
  SUPPORT_CATEGORIES from tickets.ts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
